characteristics.$text: Once per Game. The active Unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models placed by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard action.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Place a Friendly Point Defence Drone Unit anywhere on the battlefield, more than 1" away from any Enemy model. Remove this Unit at the End of the Round.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Once per Round, when a Friendly Support Unit activates a Special Ability that costs CP, resolve that ability with its CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). Do not Exhaust this card.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active Biological Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain ANTI-EVADE (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: Remove X points of accumulated Damage from the Unit (reduce its Damage Marker accordingly). HEAL cannot return Destroyed models - it only reduces existing Damage. See also: RESPAWN.
rules.name: HEAL (X)

characteristics.$text: The active Mechanical Unit resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: This Unit cannot be selected as the target of a Ranged Attack or any LoS-requiring Special Ability unless the acting model is Within 4" of it. A HIDDEN Unit is immune to the IMPACT Keyword. A HIDDEN Unit may make an Evade Roll against every attack targeting it.
rules.name: HIDDEN

characteristics.$text: Select one table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. Until the End of the Round, Enemy Units cannot Deploy from that edge.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator, they lose HIDDEN.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description:
The Unit suffers a penalty of X to the specified Characteristic until the End of the Round.
- Target Number Characteristic: increase the value by X (harder to roll).
- Value Characteristic: decrease the value by X (minimum 0).
rules.name: DEBUFF [Characteristic] (X)

rules.description: When attacking a Unit with the specified Combat Tag, treat this weapon’s Damage characteristic as X.
rules.name: PIERCE [TAG] X

rules.description: The Unit suffers X points of Damage. Add this amount effectively to the Unit’s Damage Marker. Unlike standard Damage, NON-LETHAL DAMAGE does not trigger the Remove Casualties step (Part 8.7.4, Step 5), even if Total Damage exceeds a model’s HP. If the Unit subsequently suffers standard Damage, the combined Total Damage triggers casualty removal normally.
rules.name: NON-LETHAL DAMAGE (X)

rules.description: After rolling to Hit, move up to X failed Attack Dice directly into the Armour Pool. Treat them as successful Hits for all purposes, including Surge.
rules.name: PRECISION (X)

rules.description:
The Unit gains a bonus of X to the specified Characteristic until the End of the Round.
- Target Number Characteristic (e.g. Armour, Hit): reduce the value by X (easier to roll).
- Value Characteristic (e.g. Speed, RoA): increase the value by X.
rules.name: BUFF [Characteristic] (X)

characteristics.$text: This Unit suffers NON-LETHAL DAMAGE (2). This Unit gains BUFF Speed (3). Additionally, its Quad K12 and all Close Combat Weapons gain PRECISION (2).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When an Enemy declares a Charge against a Friendly Unit Within 8", that Enemy gains DEBUFF Speed (2).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Increase this Unit's Hit Points characteristic by 1.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While this Unit is Within 3" of a Mission Marker, its Armour characteristic is increased by 1.
characteristics.name: Effect

- Value Characteristic: decrease the value by X (minimum 0).

characteristics.$text: This Unit suffers NON-LETHAL DAMAGE (2). This Unit gains BUFF Speed (3). Additionally, its C-14 Rifle and all Close Combat Weapons gain PRECISION (3).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon’s S Dice is replaced by D6.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: When resolving an attack with this weapon against Enemy Units, the target Unit suffers a -X Modifier to its Evade Roll for this attack (Part 8.7.4, Step 4).
rules.name: ANTI-EVADE (X)

characteristics.$text: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

The Unit gains a bonus of X to the specified Characteristic until the End of the Round.
- Target Number Characteristic (e.g. Armour, Hit): reduce the value by X (easier to roll).
- Value Characteristic (e.g. Speed, RoA): increase the value by X.

rules.description: After rolling to Hit, move up to X failed Attack Dice directly into the Armour Pool. Treat them as successful Hits for all purposes, including Surge.
rules.name: PRECISION (X)

rules.description: Choose a Leading Model. Remove it and set it Wholly Within X" of its starting position. Then remove and replace all other models in the Unit, maintaining Coherency (Part 4.4). PLACE ignores Gap Clearance, terrain restrictions, and elevation requirements. The Leading Model is removed and set directly, not moved along a path. However, they must end in a legal position. Models may be set Within the Engagement Range of Enemy models (the Unit becomes Engaged) unless stated otherwise.
rules.name: PLACE (X)

characteristics.$text: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (10) effect from another Friendly Unit. No model may be set Within 8" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve its Stimpack ability with the CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit suffers NON-LETHAL DAMAGE (2). This Unit gains BUFF Speed (3). Additionally, its C-14 Rifle and all Close Combat Weapons gain PRECISION (3).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon’s S Dice is replaced by D6.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description:
When this Unit performs a Ranged Attack or Close Combat Attack, models equipped with this weapon may use it, ignoring the normal restriction of one weapon per model (Part 8.7.3). If a model is equipped with multiple SIDEARM weapons, it may use all of them in the same activation.

Attacks made with each SIDEARM must be resolved in separate Batches. Because they are separate Batches, SIDEARM attacks may target a different Enemy Unit than the Unit's other weapons, subject to all standard target eligibility requirements.
rules.name: SIDEARM

rules.description:
The maximum Range of this weapon increases to X".

Measure each attacking model’s distance to the target individually:
- Within normal profile Range: attack resolves normally.
- Beyond profile Range but Within X": the model suffers a -1 Modifier to its Hit roll.

If a Batch contains models at both Standard and Long Range, generate the total dice but roll the two groups separately to account for different Hit Target Numbers.
rules.name: LONG RANGE (X")

rules.description: When resolving an attack with this weapon against Enemy Units, the target Unit suffers a -X Modifier to its Evade Roll for this attack (Part 8.7.4, Step 4).
rules.name: ANTI-EVADE (X)

rules.description: Ranged Attacks with this weapon may target Engaged Enemy Units, ignoring the standard Engagement Status restriction (overrides Part 8.7.3, Step 1).
rules.name: PINPOINT

characteristics.$text: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (4) 3+ effect.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: While Engaged, this Unit may target and be targeted by Unengaged Enemy Units. In both cases, the defending Unit gains an Evade Roll against those attacks.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Whenever a Friendly Goliath Unit targets that enemy with an Autocannon, that weapon gains Surge Type: Light, Armoured, and S Dice: D3+1.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: After rolling to Hit, move up to X failed Attack Dice directly into the Armour Pool. Treat them as successful Hits for all purposes, including Surge.
rules.name: PRECISION (X)

characteristics.$text: This Unit’s Autocannon and Underbelly Machine Gun weapons gain PRECISION (1).
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: When making a Ranged Attack with this weapon, add X to its RoA if the target Unit has Stationary Status.
rules.name: LOCKED IN (X)

rules.description:
The maximum Range of this weapon increases to X".

Measure each attacking model’s distance to the target individually:
- Within normal profile Range: attack resolves normally.
- Beyond profile Range but Within X": the model suffers a -1 Modifier to its Hit roll.

If a Batch contains models at both Standard and Long Range, generate the total dice but roll the two groups separately to account for different Hit Target Numbers.
rules.name: LONG RANGE (X")

rules.description: Ranged Attacks with this weapon may ignore Line of Sight when selecting a target and resolving Damage. The target must still be Within Range. If the target is not Visible, it may make an Evade Roll against this attack.
rules.name: INDIRECT FIRE

characteristics.$text: INDIRECT FIRE, LOCKED IN (6), LONG RANGE (24"), SIDEARM
characteristics.name: Keyword

rules.description:
The Unit suffers a penalty of X to the specified Characteristic until the End of the Round.
- Target Number Characteristic: increase the value by X (harder to roll).
- Value Characteristic: decrease the value by X (minimum 0).
rules.name: DEBUFF [Characteristic] (X)

rules.description:

- Beyond profile Range but Within X": the model suffers a -1 Modifier to its Hit roll.

If a Batch contains models at both Standard and Long Range, generate the total dice but roll the two groups separately to account for different Hit Target Numbers.
rules.name: LONG RANGE (X")

rules.description: Remove X points of accumulated Damage from the Unit (reduce its Damage Marker accordingly). HEAL cannot return Destroyed models - it only reduces existing Damage. See also: RESPAWN.
rules.name: HEAL (X)

characteristics.$text: Use when another Friendly Biological Unit suffers Damage Within 4". Reduce the Total Damage before allocation by 1 for each model in this Unit that is Within 4" of the damaged Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Until the End of the Round, apply DEBUFF Range (4) to that Unit’s Ranged Weapons. That Unit cannot benefit from LONG RANGE.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 4". Resolve the HEAL (X) effect for the targeted Unit, where X is the number of models in this Unit that are Within 4" of the target Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a DEBUFF. Remove all DEBUFFS from it.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit’s Supply Value counts as 0 when calculating the Supply Pool.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit resolves a Life Support or Medpack ability, treat it as having 1 additional model Within Range for calculating that ability's effects.
characteristics.name: Effect

- Target Number Characteristic: increase the value by X (harder to roll).
- Value Characteristic: decrease the value by X (minimum 0).

rules.name: HEAL (X)

characteristics.$text: Use when another Friendly Biological Unit suffers Damage Within 4". Reduce the Total Damage before allocation by 1 for each model in this Unit that is Within 4" of the damaged Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Until the End of the Round, apply DEBUFF Range (4) to that Unit’s Ranged Weapons. That Unit cannot benefit from LONG RANGE.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 4". Resolve the HEAL (X) effect for the targeted Unit, where X is the number of models in this Unit that are Within 4" of the target Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a DEBUFF. Remove all DEBUFFS from it.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit’s Supply Value counts as 0 when calculating the Supply Pool.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: When this Unit resolves a Life Support or Medpack ability, treat it as having 1 additional model Within Range for calculating that ability's effects.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description: When resolving an attack with this weapon against Enemy Units, the target Unit suffers a -X Modifier to its Evade Roll for this attack (Part 8.7.4, Step 4).
rules.name: ANTI-EVADE (X)

rules.description: When attacking a Unit with the specified Combat Tag, treat this weapon’s Damage characteristic as X.
rules.name: PIERCE [TAG] X

rules.description: Ranged Attacks with this weapon may target Engaged Enemy Units, ignoring the standard Engagement Status restriction (overrides Part 8.7.3, Step 1).
rules.name: PINPOINT

rules.description: This weapon cannot be used to make a Ranged Attack while the Unit is currently Engaged (Part 8.7.3).
rules.name: BULKY

rules.description:
When this Unit performs a Ranged Attack or Close Combat Attack, models equipped with this weapon may use it, ignoring the normal restriction of one weapon per model (Part 8.7.3). If a model is equipped with multiple SIDEARM weapons, it may use all of them in the same activation.

Attacks made with each SIDEARM must be resolved in separate Batches. Because they are separate Batches, SIDEARM attacks may target a different Enemy Unit than the Unit's other weapons, subject to all standard target eligibility requirements.
rules.name: SIDEARM

rules.description: REPEATABLE. Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 8", spend CP and apply one of the following effects: 1 CP: That Unit’s first used weapon gains the CRITICAL HIT (2). 1 CP: That Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round. 2 CP: Remove the Activation Marker from that Unit.
rules.name: REPETABLE

characteristics.$text: Treat this Unit’s Supply characteristic as increased by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: The Supply Value of all Friendly Units Within 8" of this Unit cannot be reduced below 1 for Contesting Mission Markers and completing objectives.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text:
REPEATABLE. Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 8", spend CP and apply one of the following effects:
- 1 CP: That Unit’s first used weapon gains the CRITICAL HIT (2). 
- 1 CP: That Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round. 
- 2 CP: Remove the Activation Marker from that Unit.
characteristics.name: Effect

rules.description:
The Leading Model may end a move Overlapping this Token or Unit (overrides Part 7.3.1).
If the Leading Model ends any Move, Deploy, Run, Charge, Disengage, Close Ranks or Special Ability move Overlapping this Token or model, the controlling player of the Leading Model immediately set it in Base-to-Base contact with the Leading Model. If Base-to-Base is not possible, set it as close as possible.
rules.name: DISPLACEMENT

characteristics.$text: When another Friendly Unit Within 4" is targeted by a Ranged Attack without the INSTANT keyword, remove up to 2 dice from the Attack Pool. Then remove this Unit from the battlefield.
characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.$text: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.
characteristics.name: Effect
